title: Earthfall
notes: Works great, but runs really slow on my card, use something better.
Online and offline both run perfect out of box. No tweaking required!
title: Earthfall

notes: Game runs out of the box with no tweaks although fullscreen doesn't work correctly leaving the game in windowed mode.
title: Earthfall

notes:
First: I suggest to add WINEDLLOVERRIDES="xaudio2_7=n,b" %command% in the game's launch options for to avoid the potential and very well known sound issue...

I played only in single player mode the two first chapters, during the FREE WEEKEND... I died A LOT. 

Fullscreen works fine and Vsync too... Everything worked OUT OF THE BOX.
I had solid 60 FPS most of the time with the graphics preset on HIGH, but I had frame drops when A LOT of enemies were attacking me and my team... It seems this game very cpu demanding.  

I had only ONE crash in 6 hours of game play, but I can't tell if it was a Proton issue or a game issue, because I had the same kind of crash, several times, with Killing Floor 2 on a Windows 7 machine.

The use on a SSD is highly recommended because this game has all the content in a huge .pak file
